_comment: Per-screen Flashlight FPS budgets. 'minFps' is an absolute floor: the CI job fails if a screen's mean UI frame rate drops below it. 'referenceFps' is the last-known-good FPS used for relative regression detection. Emulator FPS is noisy, so floors are conservative and screens are collect-only until calibrated. Run the perf job once with FLASHLIGHT_CALIBRATE=1 to populate 'referenceFps' from real measurements, then tighten floors.
